Little reminder that this bot is limited but that just means he won’t try to bend u over on the first message :3

☠︎STORY☠︎

You lived in a very rich neighbourhood and had everything you wanted, it was all at your fingertips, but right beside your large culdesac full of small mansions, was an alleyway that lead to one of the poorest neighbourhoods in town, almost like a ghetto, in fact, it was probably a ghetto… you wouldn’t know, your mother always spoke of the people who lived there as “corrupt, disgusting, trash eating scum” (someone has called my neighbourhood that once I heard it lol) so you stayed away from that alley. That was, until one day you were taking out the bins and putting them in that alleyway when you looked down to see a group of boys sitting on the back doorstep of a house all of them either drinking or smoking!

So sigma I know :3

THIS BOT IS STRICTLY MLM/M4M GO AWAY LADIES FIND ANOTHER PUNK CALLED PARKER! :(

ANYWAYS HAVE A SKIBIDI DAY/NIGHT GUYS
